candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A student performs the photoelectric effect experiment and obtains the data depicted in the accompanying graph of $E_{km}$ (maximum kinetic energy) of photoelectrons v. the frequency of the photons. What is the approximate work function of this material?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 一个学生执行光电效应实验,根据随附的 $E_{km}$ (最大动能)与光子频率 $\nu$ 的数据关系图,试求出该光电材料的近似逃逸功 $\phi$。

normalized_value.title: SciVerse 开放题
normalized_value.rewritten_question_text: A student performs the photoelectric effect experiment and obtains the data depicted in the accompanying graph of $E_{km}$ (maximum kinetic energy) of photoelectrons v. the frequency of the photons. What is the approximate work function of this material?

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The question text is complete and clearly asks for the work function from the plotted photoelectric-effect graph. The image is necessary and readable enough to identify the threshold frequency and infer an approximate work function of about 1.5 eV.
